mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user_filter ( user_id, filter_type, filter_value, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{filterType}, #{filterValue}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user_filter SET filter_type = #{filterType}, filter_value = #{filterValue}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE filter_seq = #{filterSeq} AND user_id = #{userId}
